pageSubtitle: Upload, analysis, deadlines, privacy, and troubleshooting.

faq.question: What is NoticeIQ?
faq.answer: NoticeIQ is an AI assistant that explains IRS, state, and other official letters in plain English. Upload a PDF or photo and get summaries, deadlines, and next steps.

faq.question: How does it work?
faq.answer: Upload your document. Our AI extracts deadlines, amounts, and key terms, then gives a plain-English summary and a more detailed legal-style breakdown. Suggested forms may appear when relevant.

faq.question: What file types are supported?
faq.answer: PDF, JPG, PNG, and HEIC up to 20MB. Scanned photos work; clearer images improve accuracy.

faq.question: How long does analysis take?
faq.answer: Usually 30–60 seconds. Complex or multi-page notices can take longer.

faq.question: What if processing fails?
faq.answer: Try again with a sharper scan or smaller file. If it keeps failing, contact support with the document type (e.g. CP14).

faq.question: Plain English vs legal detail?
faq.answer: Plain English is for everyday reading. Legal detail uses more formal wording and cites laws only when they appear in your letter.

faq.question: What do severity levels mean?
faq.answer: Urgent: act soon. Action needed: respond or pay by the deadline. Info: mostly FYI.

faq.question: How do I mark to-dos done?
faq.answer: On the results page, check off items under What to do. Progress is saved to your account.

faq.question: How do I search documents?
faq.answer: Use the archive search and filters for status, severity, tags, and category.

faq.question: Is my data secure?
faq.answer: Documents are stored in your private account with encryption in transit and at rest. See our Privacy Policy and Security page.

faq.question: Is this tax advice?
faq.answer: No. NoticeIQ is informational only. For advice on your situation, consult a CPA, EA, or attorney.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes—one trial analysis per account. After that, pay per document or choose a monthly plan on Pricing.
